opportunities.title: 2026 Campus Hire - Engineer (Software)
opportunities.description: Qualcomm is hiring campus graduates to work on software development for mobile chipsets and connected technologies. Engineers will design and develop embedded and platform-level software across areas such as multimedia technologies (audio/video/image processing), wireless modem technologies (4G, WiFi, Bluetooth), IoT systems, and platform software including Linux, Android, Windows, and BSP. Work includes embedded software, device drivers, protocol stacks, firmware, and application-level development.
opportunities.notesHighlights: Campus hiring role focused on embedded systems, wireless technologies, and mobile platform software. Strong focus on C/C++, OS fundamentals, networking protocols, and Linux development.

opportunities.title: Software Engineer - Backend
opportunities.description:
**Job Details**
- Role: Software Engineer - Backend
- Location: Pune
- Experience: 3 to 8 years
- Domain: Fintech / Payments

**Responsibilities**
- Design and build backend services using Java (17+)
- Develop microservices and event-driven systems
- Build scalable, reliable distributed systems
- Design REST APIs and data models (PostgreSQL)
- Improve system performance, latency, and reliability
- Write automated tests and participate in code reviews
- Work with cloud tools (AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD)

**Eligibility**
- Strong experience in Java or OOP languages
- Experience with microservices and distributed systems
- Understanding of concurrency, fault tolerance, scalability
- Experience with cloud-native architectures
- Strong problem-solving and communication skills

**Skills Required**
- Java
- Microservices
- Distributed Systems
- REST APIs
- PostgreSQL
- AWS / Cloud
- Docker / Kubernetes
- CI/CD

**Notes**
- High-performance backend role in fintech
- Requires production-level system design experience
- Not suitable for freshers
- Strong focus on scalability and reliability
opportunities.notesHighlights: Strong backend + system design role. Requires real-world production experience.

opportunities.title: Associate Analyst
opportunities.description:
Wipro is hiring Associate Analysts to design, test and maintain software programs that are deployed for client systems.

Responsibilities:
- Understand product requirements and design software solutions
- Develop software modules following SDLC practices
- Perform coding, debugging and software testing
- Conduct root cause analysis for system issues
- Automate software validation through test cases and scenarios
- Modify software to fix errors and improve performance
- Collaborate with functional teams and project managers
- Maintain documentation, reports and project status updates
opportunities.selectionProcess: Application Screening, Assessment, Technical Interview, HR Interview
opportunities.notesHighlights: Entry-level software development role focusing on coding, debugging, testing and software lifecycle activities for client deployments.

opportunities.title: Software Engineer, Cloud - Sustaining Engineering
opportunities.description:
Canonical is hiring a Software Engineer for the Cloud Sustaining Engineering team. This globally remote role focuses on troubleshooting, maintaining, and improving the open-source infrastructure stack powering Ubuntu and cloud platforms.

Engineers in this role work across multiple layers of the Linux and cloud ecosystem including virtualization, containers, storage, networking, and distributed systems. Responsibilities include diagnosing complex issues, developing fixes, contributing patches upstream, reviewing code, and collaborating with engineering, support, and product teams.

This role requires strong Linux expertise and programming experience to work across technologies such as OpenStack, Kubernetes, containers, and distributed storage systems.
requiredSkills: python or go or c or c++
opportunities.incentives: Annual bonus, learning budget ($2000/year), travel opportunities, remote work benefits
opportunities.notesHighlights: Global remote role. Requires strong Linux and open-source cloud stack experience. Travel up to 4 times per year for company events.

opportunities.title: L1 - Service Desk
opportunities.description:
Zones LLC is hiring L1 Service Desk professionals in Bangalore. This is an entry-level IT support role focused on providing remote technical assistance to global clients.

The role involves serving as the first point of contact via phone, chat, and email, troubleshooting desktop hardware, Windows OS, peripherals, and mobile devices, performing remote diagnostics, logging tickets within SLA, and escalating complex issues when required.

Candidates will work in a 24/7 rotational shift environment. Strong communication skills and basic technical troubleshooting knowledge are essential.
opportunities.incentives: Medical Insurance, Group Term Life, Personal Accident Cover, Flexible Leave Policy
opportunities.notesHighlights: 0–0.6 months experience required. 24/7 rotational shifts. Entry-level IT support role.

opportunities.title: Analyst - Decision Science
opportunities.description:
American Express is hiring an Analyst – Decision Science in Gurugram. This role is part of the Financial Crimes Decision Science and Analytics Center of Excellence, focusing on data science solutions for financial crime risk management and AML (Anti-Money Laundering) programs.

The role involves developing and deploying predictive models, analyzing large datasets to derive business insights, and leveraging machine learning techniques to support automated decision-making systems. Engineers in this role work on AI/ML models, monitor model performance, and collaborate with internal teams to develop end-to-end data science solutions.

The position requires strong analytical thinking, programming expertise in Python and SQL, and a solid foundation in mathematics and statistics.
opportunities.incentives: Bonus incentives, medical insurance, wellness programs, parental leave, career development benefits
opportunities.notesHighlights: 0–30 months experience allowed. Strong Python and SQL required. Role focuses on ML models for financial crime and AML analytics.
